C[trohde: hello again, Pjotr … Tom here, wishing you a good game too. I may drop out due to time and other Real Life issues, though
C[trohde: W played very badly … I might resign soon
C[trohde: oh my, this looks so bad for W already :-o
C[trohde: to be honest, this game looks severely fup’d uck for W, I have no idea how I did that
C[trohde: BTW, I wish you happy holidays!
C[trohde: dammit, this is not the first time I made that mistake >:o
trohde: last time I made it TWICE in the same game!
C[trohde: and a happy new year! :-)
C[trohde: Mh… W is not too happy, of course
C[trohde: now that probably was a too small move, kind of knee-jerk. I need to un-learn such nonsense, I think.
C[trohde: BTW off and on I’m leaving comments and/or variations in the Malkovich log. In hindsight many will be hilarious :v
trohde: uh-oh, I wonder whether that was a wise move …
C[trohde: Of course, W now wonders whether he can cut B off …
trohde: OOOPS that shouldhave gone to the Malkovich log :v
trohde: happens to me ever so often :-D
trohde: OK, I think it’s enough if I play O8 when B plays N9 and vice versa
C[trohde: Tomorrow I’ll be away for a few days … will switch to “vacation” because I don't know how the internet access is there
C[trohde: I just realise that when pondering over L13, M12 and Black’s N15 group I always forgot that P14 is one more liberty for B … must be very careful!
C[trohde: Hey Piotr, I’ve paused the game because time’s running short for you (you can play moves nevertheless) … feel free to click “resume” if you like.
C[trohde: Okay, so you read my mind :-)
C[trohde: To be honest, I’m not sure about the situation in the upper right … it was just a test balloon … I’m not really good at reading
trohde: not totally sure that B has no chance in the upper right situation …
trohde: guess everybody will tell me it’s dead already
trohde: it’s just that I can’t really read … I play most of my moves just from a “gut feeling”
trohde: Also, W still needs to be careful re: the centre: there are B moves that require W replies
trohde: And to remember that the black O15 group still has one liberty at P14!
C[trohde: Hi, I’m back, was away for a few days and was only online for short times.
C[trohde: thanks back to you, Piotr, maybe I just the analysis function long enough before every move
trohde: Check out the Malkovich log if you like … lots of comments/variations
trohde: and I hope we’ll play again … I found it exciting again :-)
